body:
We should have option `--use-agent-commander`, to use https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander for all our tools (claude, codex, opencode, agent), instead of logic that is embedded in our repository.

That option is experimental and should not be enabled by default.

Also we should implement it carefully so we ensure all existing features continue to work as expected without that option.

If https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander misses some features or has bugs - please file issues there, so we will be able to address them.
title: Add an option to use agent-commander
